initial_program:
row(R) :- R = 0..8.
col(C) :- C = 0..8.
rowHasNonZero(R) :- input(R,C,V), V != 0.
colHasNonZero(C) :- input(R,C,V), V != 0.
minRow = #min{R : rowHasNonZero(R)} :- rowHasNonZero(minRow).
maxRow = #max{R : rowHasNonZero(R)} :- rowHasNonZero(maxRow).
minCol = #min{C : colHasNonZero(C)} :- colHasNonZero(minCol).
maxCol = #max{C : colHasNonZero(C)} :- colHasNonZero(maxCol).
is_color(X) :- color(X).
count(1) = #count{R,C : input(R,C,1)} :- input(R,C,V), V != 0.
count(2) = #count{R,C : input(R,C,2)} :- input(R,C,V), V != 0.
count(3) = #count{R,C : input(R,C,3)} :- input(R,C,V), V != 0.
count(4) = #count{R,C : input(R,C,4)} :- input(R,C,V), V != 0.
count(5) = #count{R,C : input(R,C,5)} :- input(R,C,V), V != 0.
count(6) = #count{R,C : input(R,C,6)} :- input(R,C,V), V != 0.
count(7) = #count{R,C : input(R,C,7)} :- input(R,C,V), V != 0.
count(8) = #count{R,C : input(R,C,8)} :- input(R,C,V), V != 0.
count(9) = #count{R,C : input(R,C,9)} :- input(R,C,V), V != 0.
1 { mode(M) : color(M), M != 0 } 1 :- true.
higherExists = #count{C : is_color(C), C != 0, C != M, count(C) > count(M)} :- is_color(M), is_color(C).
:- higherExists = 0.
block1(R,C) :- row(R), col(C), R >= minRow, R <= minRow + 3, C >= minCol, C <= minCol + 3.
block2(R,C) :- row(R), col(C), R >= maxRow + 3, R <= maxRow + 6, C >= maxCol + 3, C <= maxCol + 6.
output(R,C,M) :- block1(R,C), mode(M).
output(R,C,M) :- block2(R,C), mode(M).
output(R,C,0) :- row(R), col(C), not block1(R,C), not block2(R,C).
#show output/3.

rounds.program_after:
row(R) :- R = 0..8.
col(C) :- C = 0..8.
rowHasNonZero(R) :- input(R,C,V), V != 0.
colHasNonZero(C) :- input(R,C,V), V != 0.
minRow = #min{R : rowHasNonZero(R)} :- rowHasNonZero(minRow).
maxRow = #max{R : rowHasNonZero(R)} :- rowHasNonZero(maxRow).
minCol = #min{C : colHasNonZero(C)} :- colHasNonZero(minCol).
maxCol = #max{C : colHasNonZero(C)} :- colHasNonZero(maxCol).
is_color(X) :- color(X).
count(1) = #count{R,C : input(R,C,1)} :- input(R,C,V), V != 0.
count(2) = #count{R,C : input(R,C,2)} :- input(R,C,V), V != 0.
count(3) = #count{R,C : input(R,C,3)} :- input(R,C,V), V != 0.
count(4) = #count{R,C : input(R,C,4)} :- input(R,C,V), V != 0.
count(5) = #count{R,C : input(R,C,5)} :- input(R,C,V), V != 0.
count(6) = #count{R,C : input(R,C,6)} :- input(R,C,V), V != 0.
count(7) = #count{R,C : input(R,C,7)} :- input(R,C,V), V != 0.
count(8) = #count{R,C : input(R,C,8)} :- input(R,C,V), V != 0.
count(9) = #count{R,C : input(R,C,9)} :- input(R,C,V), V != 0.
1 { mode(M) : color(M), M != 0 } 1 :- true.
higherExists = #count{C : is_color(C), C != 0, C != M, count(C) > count(M)} :- is_color(M), is_color(C).
:- higherExists = 0.
block1(R,C) :- row(R), col(C), R >= minRow, R <= minRow + 3, C >= minCol, C <= minCol + 3.
block2(R,C) :- row(R), col(C), R >= maxRow + 3, R <= maxRow + 6, C >= maxCol + 3, C <= maxCol + 6.
output(R,C,M) :- block1(R,C), mode(M).
output(R,C,M) :- block2(R,C), mode(M).
output(R,C,0) :- row(R), col(C), not block1(R,C), not block2(R,C).
#show output/3.

final_program:
row(R) :- R = 0..8.
col(C) :- C = 0..8.
rowHasNonZero(R) :- input(R,C,V), V != 0.
colHasNonZero(C) :- input(R,C,V), V != 0.
minRow = #min{R : rowHasNonZero(R)} :- rowHasNonZero(minRow).
maxRow = #max{R : rowHasNonZero(R)} :- rowHasNonZero(maxRow).
minCol = #min{C : colHasNonZero(C)} :- colHasNonZero(minCol).
maxCol = #max{C : colHasNonZero(C)} :- colHasNonZero(maxCol).
is_color(X) :- color(X).
count(1) = #count{R,C : input(R,C,1)} :- input(R,C,V), V != 0.
count(2) = #count{R,C : input(R,C,2)} :- input(R,C,V), V != 0.
count(3) = #count{R,C : input(R,C,3)} :- input(R,C,V), V != 0.
count(4) = #count{R,C : input(R,C,4)} :- input(R,C,V), V != 0.
count(5) = #count{R,C : input(R,C,5)} :- input(R,C,V), V != 0.
count(6) = #count{R,C : input(R,C,6)} :- input(R,C,V), V != 0.
count(7) = #count{R,C : input(R,C,7)} :- input(R,C,V), V != 0.
count(8) = #count{R,C : input(R,C,8)} :- input(R,C,V), V != 0.
count(9) = #count{R,C : input(R,C,9)} :- input(R,C,V), V != 0.
1 { mode(M) : color(M), M != 0 } 1 :- true.
higherExists = #count{C : is_color(C), C != 0, C != M, count(C) > count(M)} :- is_color(M), is_color(C).
:- higherExists = 0.
block1(R,C) :- row(R), col(C), R >= minRow, R <= minRow + 3, C >= minCol, C <= minCol + 3.
block2(R,C) :- row(R), col(C), R >= maxRow + 3, R <= maxRow + 6, C >= maxCol + 3, C <= maxCol + 6.
output(R,C,M) :- block1(R,C), mode(M).
output(R,C,M) :- block2(R,C), mode(M).
output(R,C,0) :- row(R), col(C), not block1(R,C), not block2(R,C).
#show output/3.
